name: MSI X870 GAMING PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-8200+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 5Gb LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 (X870GAMINGPLUSWIFI)
shortName: MSI X870 GAMING PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0
description: Gaming ATX motherboard for AMD AM5 with X870 chipset, DDR5 support, and Wi-Fi 7 for high-end Ryzen builds.
